en_title: Bethesda Boss Todd Howard Saw Marvel's Blade in May, Says Arkane 'Doing a Really, Really Great Job'
cn_title: 《B社/贝塞斯达》陶德·霍华德：最近看过《漫威刀锋》，做得非常出色
subtitle: 做得非常出色
opus_summary: 贝塞斯达总监陶德·霍华德近日透露，他本月刚看过Arkane Lyon开发的《漫威刀锋》最新版本，盛赞团队做得非常出色。这款2023年公布的漫威吸血鬼游戏多年来。

paragraphs.en: Bethesda Game Studios head Todd Howard has offered an update on the long-in-development Marvel's Blade, which is based on Marvel's vampire-slaying superhero.
paragraphs.cn: 贝塞斯达游戏工作室负责人陶德·霍华德提供了关于开发已久的《漫威刀锋》新动态，该作基于漫威旗下那位专杀吸血鬼的超级英雄。

paragraphs.en: During an interview with Entertainment Weekly , Howard said he'd recently seen what the Deathloop team at Arkane Lyon was cooking up but couldn't say when fans would get another update.
paragraphs.cn: 在《娱乐周刊》的采访中，霍华德表示他最近看了Arkane Lyon《死亡循环》团队正在制作的内容，但无法透露粉丝还要等多久才能看到下一次更新。

paragraphs.en: "I'm not at liberty to say when [we'll see more]," Howard teased, "but I saw some stuff just yesterday [on May 21] and the folks at Arkane [Studios, the developers] are doing a really, really great job."
paragraphs.cn: 霍华德卖关子说：「我不便透露何时（会有更多消息），不过就在昨天（5月21日）我看了一些东西，Arkane（工作室，即开发商）的伙计们做得非常非常出色。」

paragraphs.en: It's not much, but after years without concrete updates amid troubled times at the Xbox company, it's nice to hear anything at all. It's an especially welcome update considering rumors of a potential cancelation surfaced as recently as this month.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然信息不多，但在XBOX公司处境艰难、多年来缺乏具体更新的背景下，能听到任何消息都是好事。尤其是本月还出现了可能取消的传闻，此时这一更新格外令人欣慰。

paragraphs.en: Fans first began to fear the worst after Blade was a no-show at the 2026 Xbox Games Showcase . As the days that followed the early June presentation saw reports warning of impending shutdowns for developers like Ninja Theory, Double Fine , and Compulsion Games , Marvel fans feared Arkane and Blade could be next on the chopping block.
paragraphs.cn: 《刀锋》未在2026年XBOX游戏展示会上亮相后，粉丝们起初担心最坏的情况。6月初的发布会后，接连有报道警告Ninja Theory、Double Fine和Compulsion Games等开发商面临即将关闭，漫威粉丝担心Arkane和《刀锋》可能是下一个被砍的对象。

paragraphs.en: There's no denying that Microsoft's gaming endeavors are in a period of uncertainty as new Xbox CEO Asha Sharma . IGN has asked Microsoft for comment on the reported cuts, and on Marvel's Blade specifically we've asked Marvel Games for comment. Neither has responded.
paragraphs.cn: 随着新任XBOX CEO Asha Sharma上任，微软的游戏业务无疑正处于不确定时期。IGN已就报道中的削减请求微软置评，并专门就《漫威刀锋》项目请求漫威游戏置评，但双方均未回应。

paragraphs.en: "In Marvel’s Blade, Eric Brooks is the legendary Daywalker, half-man, half-vampire torn between the warm society of the living and the rushing power of the undead," an official description for Blade says. "From Bethesda and Arkane Lyon, Marvel’s Blade is a mature, single-player, third-person game set in the heart of Paris, now in development in collaboration with Marvel Games."
paragraphs.cn: 《漫威刀锋》的官方描述写道：「在《漫威刀锋》中，埃里克·布鲁克斯是传奇的日行者，一个半人半吸血鬼，在生者温暖的社群与不死者涌动的力量之间挣扎。由贝塞斯达和Arkane Lyon制作，《漫威刀锋》是一款设定在巴黎心脏地带的成人向单人第三人称游戏，目前正与漫威游戏合作开发中。」

paragraphs.en: Marvel's Blade was first announced back in December 2023 and currently has no release date. That means we'll have gone three years without another official look at the project when The Game Awards roll around later this year.
paragraphs.cn: 《漫威刀锋》最初于2023年12月公布，目前尚无发售日期。这意味着等到今年晚些时候的TGA颁奖礼时，我们将整整三年未见到该项目的官方亮相。

paragraphs.en: While we wait to see Blade unsheathe his sword and sharpen his fangs, you can check out one of the few reveals we've gotten since its announcement: some concept art . You can also see why we called Blade Marvel's secret weapon back in 2023.
paragraphs.cn: 在等待刀锋拔剑磨牙的同时，你可以看看自公布以来我们得到的少数展示之一：一些概念图。你也可以回顾一下2023年我们为什么称刀锋为漫威的秘密武器。
